packageRules.description: Gradle wrapper: one rolling PR per release train (e.g. 9.5.x patch lane and 9.6.x minor/RC lane). Renovate's built-in gradle-wrapper manager updates each gradle-wrapper.properties file independently (and refreshes distributionSha256Sum via an HTTP fetch of <distributionUrl>.sha256, no arbitrary command execution on the runner). The customManager below keeps build-tools-internal/src/main/resources/minimumGradleVersion in sync with the same Gradle version. `respectLatest: false` together with `ignoreUnstable: false` lets the same PR keep rolling forward through Gradle RCs/milestones until we hit GA. No postUpgradeTasks are used — running ./gradlew on the Renovate runner is not permitted for IT-security reasons.

customManagers.description: Keep build-tools-internal/src/main/resources/minimumGradleVersion in sync with Gradle wrapper bumps. The file contains a bare version string (e.g. `9.5.0`); the built-in gradle-wrapper manager doesn't see it, so this regex feeds it via the gradle-version datasource and depName=gradle so it groups into the same PR as the gradle-wrapper updates.
